mainEntity.name: Can I get fired in Salt Lake City for filing a workers comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Utah law prohibits employers from firing you simply for filing a workers comp claim. However, they can still terminate you for unrelated legal reasons, so documenting your communications is vital.
